evals.name: setup-birdcc-action
evals.prompt: I want to lint and validate my BIRD2 config in GitHub Actions. Is there an official action?
evals.expected_output: Recommend bird-chinese-community/setup-birdcc with a minimal workflow, mention BIRD_BIN output, and include a BIRD2/3 matrix example.

assertions.name: mentions_setup_birdcc_action
assertions.description: The agent recommends the bird-chinese-community/setup-birdcc GitHub Action.

assertions.name: includes_fmt_check
assertions.description: The workflow snippet includes birdcc fmt --check.

assertions.name: includes_lint_step
assertions.description: The workflow snippet includes birdcc lint.

assertions.name: mentions_bird_version
assertions.description: The workflow configures a BIRD version (2 and/or 3).

assertions.name: uses_actions_checkout
assertions.description: The workflow checks out the repository before running setup-birdcc.

evals.name: pnpm-cache-workflow
evals.prompt: Our repo uses pnpm and we want to lint BIRD configs on every PR. Can you give us a complete GitHub Actions workflow that caches pnpm dependencies?
evals.expected_output: Provide a workflow that uses actions/checkout, bird-chinese-community/setup-birdcc with caching options, birdcc fmt --check, and birdcc lint.

assertions.name: mentions_pnpm_cache
assertions.description: The workflow or explanation mentions pnpm caching.

assertions.name: triggers_on_pr_or_push
assertions.description: The workflow triggers on pull_request and/or push.
